news.t: Defiance Launches AIX: The First ETF Targeting the AI Beneficiaries Within the Nasdaq 100

holdings.infoBox: AIX is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are KLA Corporation stock at 5.52%, Advanced Micro Devices at 5.50%, Intel at 5.49%, Micron Technology at 5.30%, and Tesla at 5.23%.

overview.description: The Defiance US 100 Tech AI Moat ETF (AIX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx US 100 Tech AI Moat index. The Defiance US 100 Tech AI Moat ETF (the Fund or the AI Moat ETF) seeks to track the total return performance, before fees  and expenses, of the Indxx US 100 Tech AI Moat Index (the Index).\. AIX was launched on Jun 24, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.
infoTable: Indxx US 100 Tech AI Moat Index

data.title: Defiance Launches AIX: The First ETF Targeting the AI Beneficiaries Within the Nasdaq 100
data.text: MIAMI, June 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs, a leader in thematic and leveraged exchange-traded funds, today announced the launch of the Defiance US 100 Tech AI Moat ETF (Nasdaq: AIX) , whi...
